ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the stock market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "wap" REAL /* Weighted average price of the stock */,
  "no_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "no_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades made */,
  "total_turnover" REAL /* Total turnover in currency */,
  "deliverable_quantity" INTEGER /* Deliverable quantity of shares */,
  "percent_deliverable" REAL /* Percentage of deliverable quantity to traded quantity */,
  "spread_high_low" REAL /* Spread between high and low price */,
  "spread_close_open" REAL /* Spread between close and open price */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the stock's currency to a reference currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "exchange_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the stock exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock operates in */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the stock operates */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news item relates to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news item was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news item */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data item */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the financial data relates to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the financial data was reported */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue reported by the company */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit reported by the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) reported by the company */,
  "eps_growth" REAL /* Growth in earnings per share (EPS) compared to the previous period */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Growth in revenue compared to the previous period */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the rating relates to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst giving the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation given by the analyst */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Numerical score corresponding to the rating */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., financial institution, analyst firm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report relates to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert relates to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, news update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price paid for the stock */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
